docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00 - DEFER) SERVED OCT-24-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FANCICOLE, DREW , OWNER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-17-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-17-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT SUZANNE KING. DEFENDANT DREW FANCICOLE, OWNER OF MCLL DBA JIFFY LUBE IS PRESENT AND REPRESENTED BY SAUL BELTRAN DISTRICT MANAGER. HONORABLE JUDGE VAN AKEN AMENDED CLAIM ADDRESS THE APPROPIATE ENTITY AS MCLL DBA JIFFY LUBE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT MCLLC DBA JIFFY LUBE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY KING, SUZANNE AS TO DEFENDANT FANCICOLE, DREW , OWNER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-17-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KING, SUZANNE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-17-2018 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KING, SUZANNE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FANCICOLE, DREW , OWNER MCLLC DBA JIFFY LUBE PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SUBMITTED RELIABLE EVIDENCE FROM SOMEONE KNOWLEDGEABLE ABOUT CAR REPAIRS TO SHOW THAT JIFFY LUBE'S WORK ON HER CAR RESULTED IN THE DAMAGES SHE CLAIMS. THE COURT CORRECTS DEFENDANT'S NAME TO MC LLC, THE OWNER OF THE JIFFY LUBE FRANCHISE THAT RENDERED SERVICES TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
